plugins.name: cowork-obsidian
plugins.description: Wire Claude Cowork to a local Obsidian vault. Three skills install: /onboard-second-brain (one-time setup wizard), /open-vault (daily-driver — opens Obsidian + preps Cowork session), /second-brain (build / update / health-check / fold-back, mode-aware). Auto-detects existing vaults. Three modes (external / overlay / scaffold). Sync via Obsidian Sync, Syncthing, or Git/GitHub. Optional Claude Desktop MCP. Multi-vault aware. A knowledge base that compounds for years.
